modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Laptop fails to open documents or programs, showing error 2100.

full_description_text: The laptop powers on but is unable to open any documents or programs. Instead, the screen freezes, and a Boot Menu appears before transitioning to a black screen. An error message indicates a detection issue with the storage device (M.2), prompting the user to press ESCAPE to continue.
short_description: Laptop fails to open documents or programs, showing error 2100.
description: The laptop powers on but is unable to open any documents or programs. Instead, the screen freezes, and a Boot Menu appears before transitioning to a black screen. An error message indicates a detection issue with the storage device (M.2), prompting the user to press ESCAPE to continue.
